fields.name: Create Diagram
fields.description: Create visual diagrams including flowcharts, sequence diagrams, mindmaps, state diagrams, and class diagrams using Mermaid syntax.

fields.name: Create Chart
fields.description: Create data visualization charts including bar charts, line charts, pie charts, and more for displaying statistics and data.

fields.name: Update Artifact
fields.description: Update an existing artifact (diagram, chart, etc.) by creating a new version with modified content. Use for major rewrites affecting >30% of content.

fields.name: Update Artifact Inline
fields.description: Make targeted string replacements in an existing artifact for small edits. Use for: fixing typos, changing colors, updating single values.

fields.name: Create React Component
fields.description: Create interactive React components rendered in a sandboxed environment. Use for: interactive UIs, forms, dashboards, games, data visualizations, widgets. Supports React 18, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI components, Lucide icons, and Recharts.
